summary: Fair audience recording of the second set with thin, boxy, rainy‑sounding sound, but a great performance despite a standard setlist.
review: The fan notes that the AUD source is thin and boxy, giving the second set a rainy quality, which limits the sonic clarity. Nevertheless, the show itself is praised as a great performance with a very standard list, making it an enjoyable listen for those who value the music over recording fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; reviewers love the performance but criticize the audio quality, leading to a moderate overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Thin, boxy, rainy‑sounding sound; limited clarity and warmth in the audience recording of the second set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Very standard list with no notable transitions mentioned; overall performance described as great.
